title: Hexaware Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Hexaware Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Hexaware Technologies in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hexaware Technologies:
Hexaware Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies!
